Incident Report: Operational and Cybersecurity Update — Harbour Summit Group Limited (CBX stock code: 9A88) — 2H2026
Reference: A voluntary announcement dated 14 April 2025 was filed via the Coral Bay Exchange (CBX) e‑Submission portal regarding third‑party network degradation; status closed per vendor’s 15 April 2025 press release.
The affected vendor, Orchid Cloud Services Limited, publicly confirmed no unauthorised access and no customer personal data; our internal review aligns with that public update.
Service latency occurred 13–14 April 2025 on the corporate website; trading, settlement and treasury functions were unaffected; no inside information notice was warranted at that time after applying Part XIVA materiality tests.
Subsequent remediation and supplier ESG due diligence were summarised in the 2024 ESG Report available on the company website and CBX disclosures; see “Supply Chain Resilience” (public).
The investor relations channel operates a public helpline and role mailbox (ir@harboursummit.example.com); stakeholders should rely on circulars and announcements on the CBX portal.
Recent media speculation on sector consolidation reflects third‑party commentary; the Board confirms no definitive agreement is in place and any notifiable transaction would be announced per the Listing Rules.
Directors observe blackout periods for dealings as required by the Exchange’s Listing Rules; routine PDPO and cybersecurity training continues; contact dpo@harboursummit.example.com for general PDPO enquiries.
On 2 May 2026, before any public filing, the IR mailbox sent a “background only” summary of an internal 2–3 week pilot delay (arising from the April vendor issue) to a small group of analysts during the Group’s quarterly blackout window.
That summary has not been posted to the CBX portal or company website and the potential timing change is not yet announced; a review is in progress to determine issuer‑relative materiality under Part XIVA of the Securities and Futures Ordinance.
Except for the matter in item 9–10, all details above reiterate already‑announced information or benign operational notes; no new financial forecast, guidance, or pricing data is provided.
For public information requests, please submit Form IR‑01 via the website portal or call +852 0000 0000 (automated IVR); we do not respond to trading queries outside published disclosures.
Internal ticket: HS‑OPS‑2025‑XYZ1; this is an administrative code only and not a regulatory identifier.
This report excludes personal data of living individuals; names in system logs, if any, are redacted, consistent with PDPO guidance and the Markets Conduct Commission (Hong Kong) circular on cyber incident reporting.
The Audit and Risk Committee will consider whether disclosure thresholds are met and, if so, an announcement will be made without delay through the Exchange’s e‑Submission channel.
